title: sinningia × hybrida
intro: Sinningia × hybrida, also known as Gloxinia or Christmas Bells, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, characterized by its showy bell-shaped flowers in shades of pink, white, and purple. The leaves and roots of Sinningia × hybrida have been used in traditional medicine for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, which may help protect against oxidative stress and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Sinningia × hybrida are often infused in teas or used in tinctures to harness their medicinal properties.
